title: Quantum Cup
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Quantum Cup}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=5 |name=Quantum Cup |icon=Quantum Cup icon.png |tickername=Quantum Cup |shortname=QC |image=Quantum Cup.png |type=Online |team_number=18 |series=Quantum Cup |organizer=GRITTY GANG |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/grittygangg/ |sponsor=[https://www.instagram.com/shabla_films/ Shabla Films] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=1,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-08-16 |edate=2021-08-19 |twitter= |instagram=grittygangg |web= |discord=MU5uWMHAMN |facebook= |youtube=channel/UCU48M_BMfRIfOO1QlPNN66A/videos }} '''''[https://www.instagram.com/grittygangg/ GRITTY GANG]''''' present a BGMI for India called the '''Quantum Cup''' sponsored by '''''[https://www.instagram.com/shabla_films/ Shabla Films]'''''.The tournament features a prize pool of ₹1,00,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mayavi|b1flag=in |b1name=Shubham Chawla |b2=RA1|b2name=Vipul Kumar|b2flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Quantum Cup:''' 16th August 2021 to 19th August 2021.'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]] * '''''Phase 1:''' 16th August 2021 to 18th August 2021.'' ** A total of 32 teams (Invited+ Underdog) will play in '''''Phase 1''''' ** Teams will play a total of 12 matches ** 4 Matches to be played every day ** ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''Top 18 teams '''}} from the overall standings advance to '''''Phase-2 Grand Finals''' ''. * '''''Phase 2 (Grand Finals):''' 19th August 2021.'' ** ''Top 18 teams from '''''Phase 1''''' will play in '''''Grand Finals Phase 2''''' ** Teams will play 5 matches back to back to determine the winner. ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Kill Points''''' ||''1 per kill'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-18}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ₹1,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $1372 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
